description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a mix of dark and light exterior walls and large, multi-pane windows. The interior is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as several private rooms and a bathroom. The main entrance is marked by a prominent glass door, and the rear includes a fenced patio or small yard. The roof is flat, and the structure is surrounded by a low wooden fence on one side. The interior furnishings include a grand piano, sofas, dining table, and kitchen appliances, suggesting a contemporary, upscale residence. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and abundant natural light.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and an open-plan interior featuring upscale furnishings and a fenced patio.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial rear of the bungalow, highlighting the fenced patio, large windows, and open living area.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible here, with the main entrance, symmetrical windows, and a glimpse of the interior layout including the grand piano and living space.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the side and rear, showcasing the open-plan living and dining areas, as well as the arrangement of private rooms.
description_view_3: The opposite side is shown, emphasizing the dining area, kitchen, and the flat roof, with the patio and fence visible to the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped large windows on multiple facades
